name: RT-SHCUA: Real-Time Self-Hosted Computer-Use Agent for UAV Control
summary: arXiv:2607.17951v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Natural-language control offers a promising interface for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), but directly applying self-hosted computer-use agents (S...
description: arXiv:2607.17951v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Natural-language control offers a promising interface for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), but directly applying self-hosted computer-use agents (SHCUAs) to UAV control introduces a structural mismatch. SHCUAs are designed for interactive host-side tool use, where delayed agent iterations are often acceptable. UAV control, however, is coupled wi...
author: Di Lu, Bo Zhang, Xiyuan Li, Yongzhi Liao, Xuewen Dong, Yulong Shen, Zhiquan Liu, Jianfeng Ma
